name: generic
label: General Purpose
description: General-purpose project. Use this if no specialized harness fits.
profile_description: Local development. Adjust the profile in RUN_CONTEXT.md if remote compute is needed.
workflow_notes: Define the active objective in `docs/REQUIREMENTS.md` before starting implementation.
Keep `docs/NEXT_STEPS.md` current as the handoff for the next session.
Use `cognitive-os worktree feat/<name>` for non-trivial parallel work.
safety_notes: Keep credentials and secrets out of version control.
Review before merge for any logic changes that affect shared state.
